---
title: "Camila Pacheco Riaño"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: media/io.JPG
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: "@lacapary"
      href: https://twitter.com/lacapary
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/lacapary/
    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Researchgate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/L-Camila-Pacheco-Riano
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=EsZhToUAAAAJ&hl=en
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8539-4816

---

### Hi there!

I am Camila Pacheco! 
I'm glad you've found your way to my webpage. As an ecologist who specializes in biogeography, I'm passionate about understanding how living things are distributed across the planet and the factors that shape those patterns. Thank you for stopping by!


## Contact information
  
  * Email: [camila.pacheco.riano(at)bioenv.gu.se](mailto:camila.pacheco.riano@bioenv.gu.se) /     [pachecoriano.c(at)gmail.com](mailto:pachecoriano.c@gmail.com)
  
  * Office: Medicinaregatan 7B 41390 Göteborg

<p style="text-align: center;">*I'll be happy to get in touch!* </p>

<font size="-2">
This website is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) and hosted on Github Pages. This site is an attempt to teach myself a little something about web development.
</font>
